title_romaji: Suki ni Naru Sono Shunkan wo.: Kokuhaku Jikkou Iinkai
title_english: The Moment You Fall in Love
title_native: 好きになるその瞬間を。～告白実行委員会～
description_tr: HoneyWorks vokaloid grubundan karakterlerin yer aldığı ikinci film.
description_en: Second film starring characters from the HoneyWorks vocaloid group.
